long_run_ramp_rule: hold long run flat for first 2-3 exposures before any increase
duration_ramp_rule: grow support duration in small steps only after repeatable recovery
cutback_reduction_rule: reduce total running load by 20-30 percent
intensity_delay_rule: no specific touch until adaptation is clearly stable
extension_trigger: recovery instability; missed support weeks; elevated load context
notes: variety comes from structure and checkpointing before sharper work

long_run_ramp_rule: increase long run in small steps and never every week forever
duration_ramp_rule: add support duration before adding specificity density
cutback_reduction_rule: reduce total running load by 20-25 percent
intensity_delay_rule: progression or strides must appear before interval-like work
extension_trigger: support-only collapse risk; weak recovery; elevated load context
notes: low-frequency 10K must still mature toward a real 10K endpoint

long_run_ramp_rule: increase long run modestly, then hold or cut back before next rise
duration_ramp_rule: grow one support day or one specific session, never both aggressively together
cutback_reduction_rule: reduce long run and one support day by 20-25 percent
intensity_delay_rule: specificity starts only after base and aerobic development are stable
extension_trigger: high fatigue signals; benchmark absence does not block plan but blocks pace truth
notes: richer week structure must not become interval-heavy

long_run_ramp_rule: long run can rise in modest steps with occasional plateaus
duration_ramp_rule: support duration and specific touch rotate rather than stack
intensity_delay_rule: 10K rhythm work waits until progression or strides are already tolerated
extension_trigger: support-only identity histogram; no explicit completion outcome
notes: development motif must repeat before endpoint week

long_run_ramp_rule: reuse running_regularly long-run ramp with no extra sharpening pressure
duration_ramp_rule: support and specific load rotate rather than stack because preset stays base-only
intensity_delay_rule: no advanced sharpening and no second quality day
extension_trigger: preset starts to resemble a real performance block

long_run_ramp_rule: long run grows gradually and may plateau before specificity weeks
duration_ramp_rule: steady support grows before threshold-like work appears
cutback_reduction_rule: reduce long run and support volume by 20-30 percent
intensity_delay_rule: controlled tempo waits until stable base and long-run tolerance exist
extension_trigger: weak long-run tolerance; elevated load context; unstable recovery
notes: half specificity must arrive without becoming interval-heavy

long_run_ramp_rule: long run grows with small finish-specific additions only after stable base
duration_ramp_rule: grow support load first, then specific block duration
intensity_delay_rule: threshold durability waits until controlled tempo is tolerated
extension_trigger: specificity overload risk; no benchmark blocks pace but not plan
notes: long-run steady finish may replace midweek bigger touch

long_run_ramp_rule: long run grows cautiously because frequency is limited
duration_ramp_rule: specific workload alternates with support weeks rather than repeating weekly
intensity_delay_rule: threshold-lite work waits until long-run rhythm is stable
notes: alternating development weeks are acceptable and often preferred

long_run_ramp_rule: long run grows with occasional steady-finish insertion
duration_ramp_rule: specific duration can grow one lever at a time: reps or minutes, not both
intensity_delay_rule: threshold durability starts after controlled tempo support
extension_trigger: midweek specificity plus long-run specificity overload
notes: balanced half must look half-specific by late build

long_run_ramp_rule: reuse running_regularly long-run ramp with conservative specificity ceiling
duration_ramp_rule: specific duration grows one lever at a time because preset stays base-only
intensity_delay_rule: no advanced half sharpening and no second quality day
extension_trigger: preset starts to resemble an aggressive half plan

long_run_ramp_rule: long run grows in small steps with frequent plateaus and conservative peaks
duration_ramp_rule: support duration rises before any specificity is expanded
cutback_reduction_rule: reduce long run by 20-30 percent and lighten support days
intensity_delay_rule: marathon steady specificity waits until durable long-run routine exists
extension_trigger: recovery instability; high load context; long-run spillover fatigue
notes: day-after-long-run next running slot remains easy or recovery only

long_run_ramp_rule: long run grows steadily but with capped jumps and protected cutbacks
duration_ramp_rule: grow one support day or one specific duration block, never both aggressively
intensity_delay_rule: long-run steady finish waits until marathon steady specificity is tolerated
extension_trigger: specificity too close to long run; weak recovery pattern
notes: marathon base must stay honest as base, not race peak

long_run_ramp_rule: long run grows with plateaus before adding steady finishes
duration_ramp_rule: specific duration grows slower than total aerobic volume
intensity_delay_rule: controlled tempo stays optional and secondary to marathon steady work
extension_trigger: marathon implied race readiness; missing base endpoint
notes: long-run specificity counts as the week's main specific touch when used

long_run_ramp_rule: long run can progress more cleanly but still under one-quality ceiling
duration_ramp_rule: grow support and specific load conservatively because preset stays base-only
intensity_delay_rule: no second quality day and no race-pace progression
extension_trigger: preset starts to resemble advanced marathon block
